rawAssistant: Stonewake is a place I've been meaning to add to my map for ages - an ancient standing circle out in the east, said to be the site of some old ritual practices by the land's earliest settlers. Legend has it that on certain nights during the autumnal equinox, you can still feel the echoes of those long-forgotten ceremonies, if you know where to look. I've heard it's a beautiful sight, especially with the sun setting over the hills. If you're looking for a bit of history and some fresh bearings, Stonewake might be worth a visit.
